legal_move_count: {current_player_name} is to move. {legal_move_rule_text} How many legal move squares does {current_player_name} have?
{current_player_name} is to move. {legal_move_rule_text} Count the legal move squares available to {current_player_name}.
{current_player_name} is to move. {legal_move_rule_text} What is the number of legal move squares for {current_player_name}?
{current_player_name} is to move. {legal_move_rule_text} How many empty squares are legal moves for {current_player_name}?
{current_player_name} is to move. {legal_move_rule_text} Determine the number of legal move squares for {current_player_name}.
flip_count_for_marked_move: {current_player_name} is to move. {legal_move_rule_text} {marked_move_rule_text} {flip_rule_text} If {current_player_name} plays on the marked square, how many discs flip?
{current_player_name} is to move. {legal_move_rule_text} {marked_move_rule_text} {flip_rule_text} Count the discs that would flip if {current_player_name} plays the marked move.
{current_player_name} is to move. {legal_move_rule_text} {marked_move_rule_text} {flip_rule_text} What is the number of discs that would change color if the marked move is played?
{current_player_name} is to move. {legal_move_rule_text} {marked_move_rule_text} {flip_rule_text} How many opponent discs would flip after the marked move?

frontier_disc_count: {frontier_rule_text} How many {query_player} discs are frontier discs?
{frontier_rule_text} Count the {query_player} discs that are frontier discs.
{frontier_rule_text} What is the number of {query_player} frontier discs?
{frontier_rule_text} How many {query_player} discs touch at least one empty square?
{frontier_rule_text} Determine the count of {query_player} frontier discs.

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_compact_board: a 6 by 6 Reversi board with black and white discs
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_classic_board: an 8 by 8 Reversi board with black and white discs
code_prompt_defaults.legal_move_rule_text: A legal move is an empty square where placing the current player's disc would sandwich one or more opponent discs in a straight row, column, or diagonal between the new disc and another current-player disc.
code_prompt_defaults.marked_move_rule_text: The red marked empty square is the marked move.
code_prompt_defaults.flip_rule_text: The marked move flips every bracketed opponent disc.
code_prompt_defaults.frontier_rule_text: A frontier disc is a disc of the named color that touches at least one empty square in any of the 8 neighboring directions: horizontal, vertical, or diagonal.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_legal_move_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for every legal move square
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_flip_count_for_marked_mo: set "annotation" to one pixel point [x,y] at the center of every disc flipped by the marked move
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_frontier_disc_count: set "annotation" to one pixel point [x,y] at the center of every counted {query_player} frontier disc
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_legal_move_count: set "answer" to the count of legal moves
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_flip_count_for_marked_move: set "answer" to the count of discs flipped by the marked move
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_frontier_disc_count: set "answer" to the count of {query_player} frontier discs
